name: Asteria
description: '''Matthew James Joines''' (born 27 May 2006), known professionally as '''Asteria''' (stylized in all lowercase), is a [[New Zealand]] record producer, singer, and songwriter currently based in [[Warsaw]], [[Poland]]. He is a prominent figure in the "[[scenecore]]" and [[krushclub]] subgenres, known for a production style he describes as "sonic anarchy." As of 2026, he has reached over 1.2 million monthly listeners on [[Spotify]].
